meta.title: ipv8 — IP Tools & Utilities
meta.description: Free online IP tools: IP lookup, subnet calculator, IPv4/IPv6 converter, binary/hex converter, port reference and more.

tools.title: Network Tools
tools.subtitle: Essential utilities for network engineers and developers

ipLookup.title: IP Lookup
ipLookup.desc: Get geolocation, ISP and network info for any IP address

subnet.title: Subnet Calculator
subnet.desc: Calculate network address, broadcast, host range and more

converter.title: IP Converter
converter.desc: Convert between decimal, binary, hexadecimal representations

cidr.title: CIDR Range
cidr.desc: List all IPs in a CIDR range or find overlap between ranges

port.title: Port Lookup
port.desc: Search common network ports and their services

latency.title: HTTP Latency
latency.desc: Measure HTTP response time from your browser to any URL

about.desc: Free, fast, and privacy-respecting network tools. No tracking, no ads, no signup. Built for engineers who just need things to work.

footer.copy: © 2026 ipv8.com — All tools run in your browser
